import React from 'react'; import { Box, Container, Grid, Typography, Link, IconButton, useTheme, } from '@mui/material'; import { Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, Phone, Email, LocationOn, } from '@mui/icons-material'; const Footer = () => { const theme = useTheme(); return ( {/* Hospital Info */} Lumbini Nepal Hospital Providing quality healthcare services to our community since 2024. We are committed to excellence in patient care and medical innovation. {/* Quick Links */} Quick Links Find a Doctor Departments Book Appointment About Us Contact Us {/* Contact Info */} Contact Information +977 1234567890 info@lumbininepalhospital.com 123 Hospital Street,
Lumbini Province, Nepal {/* Copyright */} © {new Date().getFullYear()} Lumbini Nepal Hospital. All rights reserved. ); }; export default Footer;
